overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a sunlit urban residential area in Night City. The player character walks along a sidewalk past palm trees, weathered houses, and futuristic billboards, transitioning from a commercial intersection into a quieter residential street with overgrown vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with large billboards and street signs

events.description: approaching and entering the intersection at Crestmont street
turning right at the intersection onto the residential sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk and crossing the intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk waiting at the corner

entered.detail: red street sign mounted on traffic light pole
red street sign indicating Crestmont street
black and white regulatory speed limit sign
large digital billboard with advertisements on building facade
tall palm tree trunk on the sidewalk edge
elevated highway or monorail structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny commercial street corner with prominent street signs for Sequoia and Crestmont. The camera walks forward toward the intersection, passing a speed limit sign and palm tree, with large digital billboards visible on the left. Pedestrians wait at the corner ahead as the camera approaches the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with weathered houses and overgrown vegetation

events.description: transitioning from commercial intersection to residential neighborhood with porched houses
passing close by a pedestrian with distinctive green hair

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the residential sidewalk passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright green hair and blue top walking past the camera carrying a bag

entered.detail: small commercial building with blue and yellow paint and graffiti art
raised wooden house with front porch and stairs showing signs of wear
large green waste container on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the scene shifts to a residential street lined with weathered houses and palm trees. The camera passes a yellow building with graffiti on the left and a green dumpster, while pedestrians including a person with bright green hair walk by. The overpass structure remains visible ahead as the sidewalk continues through this sunlit neighborhood.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with massive circular billboard structure overhead

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the large circular billboard structure
camera tilts back down to normal walking level

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the large circular billboard structure overhead

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structure with digital screens and advertisements towering over the street
tall lighting rigs visible behind the houses

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the residential street and tilts upward to reveal a massive circular billboard structure towering overhead with digital advertisements. After observing the structure, the camera returns to walking level, passing the green dumpster and weathered houses as the overpass remains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with American flag and construction debris

events.description: approaching a pedestrian walking in the same direction ahead
passing house with large American flag hanging from the porch

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk approaching and passing a pedestrian in a brown jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: well-maintained green hedge along the property line
residential house with large American flag displayed on the front porch
pile of debris and collapsed materials on the street side

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down the residential street past trimmed hedges and a collapsed structure. The camera approaches and passes a pedestrian in a brown jacket, then moves past a house displaying a large American flag. The overpass structure looms closer ahead as the walk continues through this sunlit urban residential area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk from a bustling commercial intersection into a weathered, sunlit residential neighborhood. It begins at a sunny street corner marked by Sequoia and Crestmont signs, moving past digital billboards and palm trees toward a group of pedestrians waiting at a crosswalk. As the camera crosses the intersection, the environment shifts into a quieter residential area characterized by graffiti-covered yellow buildings, green dumpsters, and pedestrians with vibrant hair. The perspective then tilts upward to reveal a massive circular billboard structure towering overhead before returning to street level to pass trimmed hedges and a collapsed building. Finally, the camera moves past a house displaying a large American flag as the looming structure of an overpass grows larger in the distance.
